strengths: ~17 years of polyglot engineering spanning high-throughput infrastructure (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second), embedded systems, full-stack product delivery, and now AI-agent tooling — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum with genuine cross-domain depth.
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) demonstrates current, builder-level fluency with the exact AI tooling this role centers on.

Founder of GISCollective and author of multiple shipped open-source platforms (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav) evidences sustained entrepreneurial initiative and an established pattern of building and shipping independently — a preferred qualifier for this role.
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; dual Bachelor's background does not satisfy the preferred Master's/PhD qualification.
Resume lacks evidence of strategic advisory work or director-level customer-facing engagement, which are core responsibilities of this position.
AI expertise is concentrated in the current role (April 2025–present), leaving a thin track record of recognized AI product delivery relative to the seniority the role demands.

key_factors.factor: Absence of advanced AI degree and strategic advisory track record

response.justification: James Smith brings 17+ years of hands-on engineering depth across an unusually wide surface area — high-throughput data systems, geo-platform entrepreneurship, full-stack product delivery, and active AI-agent infrastructure — making him a credible builder-fluent technologist who can speak to cloud and AI from genuine first principles. His current work on MCP frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq is precisely the cutting-edge AI tooling this role prioritizes, and his history of founding and shipping open-source platforms signals the entrepreneurial, independent-contributor mindset the position values. A consistent culture of public knowledge-sharing (FOSS4G conference talk, multiple multi-day workshops) further demonstrates the ability to inspire others internally and externally — a named key responsibility. While he lacks a graduate AI degree and a long advisory track record at the strategic-customer level, the combination of verified seniority, real AI-agent implementation experience, and demonstrated technical breadth positions him as a strong practical candidate for a role that prizes builder credibility.
